untranslatable_reason: Broadening pattern detection requires identifying oscillating minor highs and lows with expanding amplitude. This requires multi-bar pattern recognition logic (pivot detection, envelope expansion measurement) that cannot be expressed as simple indicator comparisons. The allowed indicators lack pattern-specific tools for detecting broadening formations.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using Donchian channels to detect breakout above/below formation boundaries, but this does not validate the core pattern requirement: at least two minor highs and two minor lows forming an expanding oscillation. A proper implementation would require custom pattern recognition logic or specialized pattern indicators not available in the allowed set.
